scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,desktop -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:backend" "sleep 2 && pnpm run dev:desktop"
scripts.dev:backend: cd packages/backend && source .buildenv/bin/activate && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8765
scripts.release:mac: node scripts/delete-github-assets.js && pnpm run build:backend && pnpm --filter @cursor-urban/desktop release:mac
scripts.release:win: node scripts/delete-github-assets.js && pnpm run build:backend && pnpm --filter @cursor-urban/desktop release:win
